modifier.dreamtinker.goliath_damage.desc: Deal more damage to that larger than you, but deal less damage to that smaller than you.
modifier.dreamtinker.four_warning.flavor: All fourth are warning, but the fifth is the end
modifier.dreamtinker.four_warning.descri: Fifth damage to same entity deal much more, but the other four damage deal less
modifier.dreamtinker.sweet_death.descrip: Increase 40 block amount and 90 block angle, but decrease 0.15 use item speed and 30% knockback per level. If block in 3s per level, deal counter attack which is 25% per level.
modifier.dreamtinker.last_kiss.descripti: Increase 0.5 use item speed and decrease 20% block amount and 25% block angle. If block in 3s per level, gain regeneration 2s per level with amplify same as modifier level
modifier.dreamtinker.curse_fire.flavor: The flesh is bound by interdiction, but the flame is not extinguished.
modifier.dreamtinker.curse_fire.descript: Apply curse and soul fire to target; and apply one of Edict mob effect to self
modifier.dreamtinker.falsify_fate.flavor: And yet, fate always leads you to the best choice.
modifier.dreamtinker.falsify_fate.descri: Increase mining speed to hard block, but decrease to soft ones
modifier.dreamtinker.falsify_fate.mining: Mining speed from the unchosen fate
modifier.dreamtinker.undergarden_rot_kil: Deal extra 50% damage to Rot Spawn per level
modifier.dreamtinker.undergarden_rot_pro: Increase Protection For Rot Spawn mobs
Deal extra 50% damage to Cavern creatures per level
modifier.dreamtinker.undergarden_miner.d: Increase extra 50% mining speed to undergarden blocks
modifier.dreamtinker.frost_steel_shell.d: Inmate to movement slowness, but decrease 5% movement speed
modifier.dreamtinker.silky_crystal.descr: A better silk touch, can mine budding
modifier.dreamtinker.arrow_harvest.descr: Trigger an explode like harvest that fortune level decide by velocity and projectile damage
modifier.dreamtinker.sticky_string.descr: Increase 0.5 projectile damage but decrease 0.2 draw speed Per Level
modifier.dreamtinker.over_sticky.descrip: Increase Over Slime amount when attacked; When receiving non-fire/magic damage, start become hardness
modifier.dreamtinker.occ_harvest_fulfill: Could reveal secret Other world block to its real form; Random change harvest speed based on block name
modifier.dreamtinker.occ_view.descriptio: Gain the effect of Third Eye when wear like Otherworld Goggles
modifier.dreamtinker.otherworld_precious: This precious grants you One extra Delusion Slot
modifier.dreamtinker.side_attack.descrip: Increase melee damage/projectile power based on the angle between your and target direction
modifier.dreamtinker.side_attack.attack_: Damage based on look angle between target
modifier.dreamtinker.side_attack.project: Projectile damage based on projectile speed direction and target direction
modifier.dreamtinker.view_tracing.descri: Projectile would trace the entity you seen
modifier.dreamtinker.rainbow_lights.desc: Damage would be divided by 7, but deal extra 9 times damage with random type and same source.
modifier.dreamtinker.born_with_me.descri: When kill an entity or hit an entity has less health than you, perform a full extra attack to nearby entity. Each level increases the extra attack damage. Extra attack would light self and target, and deals damage to the attacker equal to 5% per level of the damage dealt by this extra attack.
modifier.dreamtinker.doom_track.flavor: To advance, To crush, To declare, and to ruin all things.
modifier.dreamtinker.doom_track.descript: After hit an entity, deal extra ruin wheel damage based on damage dealt and boost by target armor, toughness, size, resistance, shield and if its a boss
modifier.dreamtinker.doom_ray.flavor: a sentence carved through the barrel
modifier.dreamtinker.doom_ray.descriptio: After hit an entity, deal damage to entities behind it
modifier.dreamtinker.pressing_front.desc: Hit apply 'pressing front' effect, which decrease armor and apply gravity effect
modifier.dreamtinker.pupal_omen.flavor: Betwixt chitin and feather, it awaits its appointed rebirth.
modifier.dreamtinker.pupal_omen.descript: When receive melee or projectile damage, gain armor, toughness and blood in shell. Otherwise gain protection and fate veil. But not able to do it in same time
modifier.dreamtinker.pupal_omen_scale.to: Hard to rouse, harder to subdue: %d/%d
modifier.dreamtinker.pupal_omen_moth.too: Time to change, time to wind: %d/%d
modifier.dreamtinker.pupal_omen.failure: Worm without shell, moth without wing,  cannot break the Pupal.
modifier.dreamtinker.pupal_omen.success_: The chitin form is set; the shell grows within.
The feather form is set; it rises with the wind.
modifier.dreamtinker.awaiting_hour.descr: After dealing full charged critical damage, gain attack damage and projectile damage. Otherwise gain attack speed, draw speed and velocity.
modifier.dreamtinker.with_wing_with_scal: Could be repair by scolecite, each one provide 500
modifier.dreamtinker.scale_within.descri: Armor would cause extra damage deduction, but only 40% of it would be effective; Gain 6 blood in shell
modifier.dreamtinker.wing_without.flavor: It flows as the wind does.
modifier.dreamtinker.wing_without.descri: Protection would cause extra damage deduction, but only 50% of it would be effective; Gain 20% fate veil
modifier.dreamtinker.as_wing.description: Full strength left click would shoot a wing-blade. It could pierce one entity, and deal 60%+15% attack damage
modifier.dreamtinker.feather_wake.descri: After projectile, deal magic damage to entity behind
modifier.dreamtinker.carapace_fall.descr: Increase attack damage/projectile damage based on armor wear
modifier.dreamtinker.carapace_fall.proje: projectile Damage based on armor wear
modifier.dreamtinker.pale_oath.flavor: The oath has not yet broken.
modifier.dreamtinker.pale_oath.descripti: Protects allied players, villagers, Allays, and tamed animals whose owner is allied to you. When a protected target within 16 blocks takes damage, you redirect 10% of that damage to yourself. Each protected target you guard grants 10% protection.
modifier.dreamtinker.heal_oath.flavor: As long as they still breathe, the oath still stands.
modifier.dreamtinker.heal_oath.descripti: When a nearby protected target falls below half health, you take reduced damage based on how wounded they are, up to 20%.
modifier.dreamtinker.for_oath.flavor: The blade remembers who made the innocent bleed.
modifier.dreamtinker.for_oath.descriptio: Enemies that harm your protected targets gain Evil. You deal increased damage to them based on their Evil and this modifier's level. Striking them consumes part of their Evil.
modifier.dreamtinker.pale_oath.success_s: The oath has shattered. Only despair remains.
modifier.dreamtinker.broken_oath.flavor: The oath has shattered. Only despair remains.
modifier.dreamtinker.broken_oath.descrip: No longer protects nearby targets. Taking damage, striking evildoers, or witnessing protected targets die builds Despair. At full Despair, your next attack releases a rain of swords.
modifier.dreamtinker.forlorn_judgment.fl: The blade no longer asks whom it failed to save.
modifier.dreamtinker.forlorn_judgment.de: Deal increased damage based on the enemy's Evil, then consume part of their Evil.
modifier.dreamtinker.last_body.flavor: A knight who has lost everything still refuses to fall.
modifier.dreamtinker.last_body.descripti: When below half health, take reduced damage. The lower your health is, the greater the reduction; the deeper your Despair, the higher the reduction cap.
tooltip.dreamtinker.forlorn_steel.despai: The rain of swords is gathering.
Gain 25% Protection Reprise Per level. Protection Reprise would reduce damage based on uncapped protection value of current damage.
modifier.dreamtinker.eternity_defense.fl: I know this world to be as fleeting as the morning dew.
modifier.dreamtinker.eternity_defense.de: Remembers damage types when struck and reduces repeated damage of remembered types. Each level increases remembered types by 1, up to 3.
modifier.dreamtinker.to_the_moon.descrip: At full Wishes, left click releases a crescent slash and enters an empowered state. Cannot release again during empowerment or cooldown.
modifier.dreamtinker.many_wishes.descrip: Attack target could collecting wishes. Gain additional Wishes while empowered, and hits yield additional loot and bypass some shield. Your attack speed would not less than 1.0.
modifier.dreamtinker.signet.description: Hits against enemies above half health deal extra frost damage; hits against enemies below half health deal extra final damage. Consecutive hits build SkyFire Heat. Once full, the next hit releases a wide fire slash and consumes health and durability.
modifier.dreamtinker.metamorphosis.descr: At low health, enter Metamorphosis: increased damage and knockback resistance, immunity to freezing, slowness, and burning, attacks with frost or fire bursts, reduced healing, and constant hunger. After taking damage, create a frost field around you.
modifier.dreamtinker.burden_bearer.flavo: Their fall is yours to bear
modifier.dreamtinker.burden_bearer.descr: When an ally dies within 16 blocks, gain Burden Bearer for 20 seconds. Further nearby allied deaths refresh its duration and increase its level.
modifier.dreamtinker.whimsy_face.flavor: I will die over petty change
modifier.dreamtinker.whimsy_face.descrip: Attracts hostile attention and greatly increases visibility
modifier.dreamtinker.rhinegold_cat.flavo: A gilded paw always finds something valuable
modifier.dreamtinker.rhinegold_cat.descr: Strikes can mark and pilfer creatures; defeating marked creatures may yield additional treasures
material.dreamtinker.echo_alloy.flavor: Its echo of mystery, or echo of enigma
material.dreamtinker.moonlight_ice.flavo: This piece of ice takes its form from the moonlight—its plenitude and its absences.
material.dreamtinker.valentinite.flavor: The start of Currus Triumphalis Antimonii
material.dreamtinker.nigrescence_antimon: Void-Antimony, Corruptum Antimonii,Antimony of the First Death......Names so manifold it doth bear
ALL depend on a single string
material.dreamtinker.metallivorous_stibi: Is the wolf that forge and the mental that savage
material.dreamtinker.deliverance.flavor: From sealed frost to consuming skyfire
material.dreamtinker.larimar.flavor: Tell Me Why Waves Roar High
material.dreamtinker.malum_malignant_lea: Born from Gold, Live as Lead
material.dreamtinker.amber.flavor: The world, too, has known stillness — as amber does.
material.dreamtinker.half_rotten_homuncu: Born from a deadly joke and full of cured
material.dreamtinker.despair_gem.flavor: After desire drown in tears, time devoted by wolves......only remain is despair
material.dreamtinker.soul_steel.flavor: Soul with Steel but another form
With Solar power, This is rarely come from Gold
material.dreamtinker.arcane_gold.flavor: Its a symbol of Arcane other than just Gold
material.dreamtinker.malum_blazing_quart: Increases projectile damage by 0.5 per level. And Causes arrows to ignite, burning targets for 5 seconds per level.
material.dreamtinker.eidolon_soul_gem.fl: Gain ability to overcome undead from the undead
material.dreamtinker.fifth_stone.flavor: The first magic of homo sapiens
material.dreamtinker.fifth_stone.encyclo: The first magic of homo sapiens, with this let beast killed
material.dreamtinker.spiral_spin.flavor: The third magic of homo sapiens
material.dreamtinker.spiral_spin.encyclo: The third magic of homo sapiens
material.dreamtinker.ruin_wheel_steel.fl: Stone left the hand, fire entered the barrel, and the wheel passed over the earth. It was, it is, and it ever shall be—ordained to ruin all things.
material.dreamtinker.ruin_wheel_steel.en: Stone left the hand, fire entered the barrel, and the wheel passed over the earth. It was, it is, and it ever shall be—ordained to ruin all things.
material.dreamtinker.ruin_wheel_steel_tr: The first stone, the first flame, and the first wheel bear witness in this moment
material.dreamtinker.ruin_wheel_steel.hi: Ruin Wheel steel answers to casting, flame, and rotation. When all three are present, ruin is rekindled.
material.dreamtinker.atonement_silver.fl: Pain sealed in amber, mercy sharpened in silver.
material.dreamtinker.whimsy_gold.flavor: Gold made light enough to follow a curious paw
item.dreamtinker.tntarrow.description:
a consumable, special arrow deal range damage
Effect range less than exploding range！！
item.dreamtinker.mashou.description: Composing poetry while wielding a spear—truly a hero of his time!----a special heave spear that slow and sweep. Need to ride something or with strength effect otherwise apply weakness to self. Have moderate looting effects
item.dreamtinker.under_plate.description: Clothing is the boundary the soul sewed onto the body
item.dreamtinker.narcissus_wing.descript:
Memory, Wish, Soul, Persona, Reason......This ritual blade that exists because of you.
 This dream only meaning for you, before story ends
Tool would become powerful when advancements complements. Expanded is powerful on it.
item.dreamtinker.silence_glove.descripti:
A special tool that have 5 inventory slots that is capable for tinkers` construct tool.
 When the inventory is not empty, left operation and right use item operation with this tool would be transformed with random one of the inventory tool.
 Found in loot chest of ancient city or trail ruins rare
When curio loaded, it can equip on hands slot and increase ring size based on tool melee damage and still trigger effects
item.dreamtinker.chain_saw_blade.descrip:
Show your loyalty!
 Need fill with fuel or electric to use
item.dreamtinker.hypnagogic_transmute.to:
Book about the most mystery other side arts.
 by Brahypno
tooltip.nigrescence_antimony.desc1: Void-Antimony, Corruptum Antimonii,Antimony of the First Death......Names so manifold it doth bear
tooltip.nigrescence_antimony.desc2: And lo, the means of its grasping are but simple.
tooltip.star_regulus.desc1: This is no true Magnum Opus—yet its essence quivers on the threshold of that sacred transmutation.
tooltip.star_regulus.desc2: By the arcane forge of Tinker’s Construct, through eldritch craft and secret rites, thou hast summoned them into being.
tooltip.void_pearl.desc1: Reform by the darkest deepest null
tooltip.dreamtinker.memory_cast_1: Born in a breath, often following, rest with you
tooltip.dreamtinker.memory_cast_2: Found in Algae sea, fire cannot touch, should not separated
tooltip.dreamtinker.wish_cast_1: Born in an initial, often following, to lie with you in the long sleep
tooltip.dreamtinker.wish_cast_2: free of the wages and fruits of sin，allie of the wages and fruits of sin,to lie with you in the long sleep
tooltip.dreamtinker.soul_cast_1: Born in an instant, often contradicting, always united
tooltip.dreamtinker.soul_cast_2: Even after all flesh, bone, and entrails have been sliced away, I still lie nestled with you in the marrow that remains.
tooltip.dreamtinker.soul_cast_3: Born in undead, resources of soul, reform as of lost shape
tooltip.dreamtinker.soul_cast_4: Condense Soul, too close to the sun, reform as of lost shape
tooltip.dreamtinker.soul_cast_5: The Life weight wing, the heart red, verdant and graceful
tooltip.dreamtinker.persona_cast_2: The first droplet, born in fire, always united
tooltip.dreamtinker.reason_cast_1: Born in huge dream, never awake, always united
tooltip.dreamtinker.reason_cast_2: Born in long dream, never aware, always united
tooltip.dreamtinker.reason_cast_3: Hung dream finally awake，Long dream inevitable aware，But as pure as usual
tooltip.dreamtinker.white_peach: embody life's delights and pleasures, but are equally fragile and short-lived
tooltip.dreamtinker.malignant_gluttony_3: With Such malignant, bring the consciousness null and curse
tooltip.dreamtinker.fox_fur_1: Only Obtainable when weapon fox finish eating!
tooltip.dreamtinker.iron_golem_heart: 15% chance obtainable if iron golem killed by enemy
tooltip.dreamtinker.snake_fang: Only Obtainable when kill ender dragon with 'Severing'
tooltip.dreamtinker.narcissus_2: What lies spread all over the valley?

fluid.dreamtinker.molten_echo_shard.flui: Molten echo have high base damage, and make entities darkness

Molten albedo stibium give night vision

advancements.dreamtinker.root.title: Dream Tinker
advancements.dreamtinker.materials.raw_s: From the ore, a rare byproduct was unearthed
advancements.dreamtinker.materials.valen: The point where the work begins
advancements.dreamtinker.materials.nigre: It was never accomplished in a single stroke
advancements.dreamtinker.materials.molte: Moonlight Is the Colour of Albedo
advancements.dreamtinker.materials.metal: Calamity and suffering are ornaments upon the proper path
advancements.dreamtinker.materials.molte: Light is born within the mirror, for it reflects its own likeness
advancements.dreamtinker.materials.liqui: Bright as the Stars, Red as Blood
A thing only humans can accomplish
advancements.dreamtinker.materials.ruin_: Let the cast stone, the kindled fire, and the turning wheel return as one within a single strike

dreamtinker.glyph_desc.glyph_tinker: Only working in the Per Aspera Scriptum other casting modifier and allow tinkers` modifiers&tool status being used. Like amplify but not triggered continuously and mostly limited on glyph that deal damage. Use tool harvest tier to increase amplify

Now This jar block can be put inside any Transmute and melt entity inside
 Use spell to heal entity inside.

Use preservation wish to increase fuel rate for the Transmute.

Part of the Transmute
